projects.name: Quadratic Voting (RxC)
projects.description: Mathematical voting tool where voters allocate voice credits quadratically to issues they care about. Proven in Taiwanese Presidential Hackathon and Colorado state budget allocations.

projects.name: SEEDS Regenerative Currency
projects.description: Regenerative currency ecosystem on Telos blockchain. Evolved into Hypha DAO Organization-in-a-Box solutions.

projects.name: Regen Civics Alliance
projects.description: Alliance piloting 13 place-based regenerative development projects globally (eco-villages, food forests) equipped with Hypha DAO tools for local governance and cooperative business models.

people.skills: Political economy, democratic innovation, quadratic voting, cooperative plurality, mechanism design
people.notes: Author of 'Radical Markets: Uprooting Capitalism and Democracy for a Just Society'. Microsoft researcher. Key figure in democratic innovation.

people.skills: Community building, DAO governance, sociocracy, regenerative economics
